scores.correctness_notes: All key facts match the gold standard: ContainerPath with absolute-only paths and RelativePathError, PebbleConnectionError, ensure_contents signature and return value, PathProtocol for cross-substrate type hints, LocalPath with mode/user/group support. The default mode shown as 0o644 correctly equals the gold standard's 420 decimal.
scores.hallucination_notes: Extra methods shown (unlink, rmdir, is_file, is_dir, with_suffix, parent, name) are natural pathlib extensions consistent with the library's described pathlib-like interface — not fabrications. No clearly invented APIs or parameters detected.
